title: rubus × steriliflorus
intro: Rubus × steriliflorus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis), resulting in a unique plant with characteristics of both parent species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × steriliflorus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves, stems, and roots in hot water or a solvent, and are commonly used to support overall well-being.
